final_prompt.prompt:
Create a movie poster for "大话西游" (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "90年代港片" aesthetic with film grain — references in the spirit of 1990s Hong Kong cinema poster design, Wong Kar-wai's "Chungking Express" color palette, 王家卫 film photography; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include 至尊宝 and 紫霞 in an embrace/kiss on a city wall as the central focus, 牛魔王 standing in the distance, 唐僧 standing in the distance
Scene/backdrop: must include the city wall setting with distant figures visible
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must include film grain texture
Text (verbatim): must include "大话西游"
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
